name: Sales Agent
description: Qualifies new leads and drafts personalized counseling scripting templates.

name: Support Agent
description: Reviews open help tickets and auto-drafts responses from troubleshooting FAQ catalogs.

name: HR Agent
description: Queries internal company handbook guidelines and answers leave policies questions.

name: Finance Agent
description: Generates mock invoice status calculations and billing cycle forecast indicators.

name: Marketing Agent
description: Analyzes social channel traffic statistics and drafts course packaging newsletters.
